pick.name: Champion Pick

interaction.note: When P1 champion changes, update standing image, name text, P1/P1 title accent and side-frame tint/glow.
When P2 champion changes, update standing image, name text, P2 title accent and side-frame tint/glow.
When P1 champion changes, update standing image, name text, P1/P1 title accent and side-frame tint/glow.
When P2 champion changes, update standing image, name text, P2 title accent and side-frame tint/glow.
Use normal/hover arrow assets. On click, move carousel 1 step; scale 0.96 while pressed.
Use normal/hover arrow assets. On click, move carousel 1 step; scale 0.96 while pressed.
Use 11 normal, 12 hover, 13 pressed. Enable only when both players have selected champions.
Use 14 normal, 15 hover, 16 pressed.
Runtime shows max 3 cards: center focus, left/right dim. Press arrow to slide cards; center card scale/glow increases, side cards fade back.

Use 14 normal, 15 hover, 16 pressed.
Use 14 normal, 15 hover, 16 pressed.

runtimeNotes: Only three carousel hero cards should render at runtime: left, center, right.
All nine champions are already registered in champions.json and in this studio; do not manually place nine cards on the pick screen.
HeroCardFactory uses champion.cardArt + champion.icon + champion.name + champion.accent and the fixed frame layers.
Side frames P1/P2 should bind to p1Champion and p2Champion and update portrait/name/accent/stats together.
Button animation uses the existing normal/hover/pressed assets.

runtimeNotes: QA screen only. It proves all 9 hero cards use the same frame/art/icon alignment.

frame.note: Full-frame rendering. No aperture crop and no socket cutout in Studio.

motion.carousel: on arrow click: slide 180ms easeOutCubic, center card glow/scale up, side cards dim/scale down, update centerIndex after transition
motion.players: on champion confirm: bind standing/name/accent/stats to active player panel
motion.buttons: hover swaps hover asset; pressed swaps pressed asset and scale 0.96 for 90ms

cardFactory.note: Hero cards are runtime composites: art fits inside the artwork window, icon overlays the bottom socket, frame is never cropped or punched.

responsive.policy: Use landscape screen when viewport width >= height. Use portrait screen when viewport height > width. Scale selected screen uniformly to fit viewport and preserve aspect ratio.
